title: RETTACY A4 Lined Notebook College Ruled/Thick Journal - Extra Large Softcover Composition Notebooks with 2 Free Sticky Notes 320 Pages,Faux Leather, Inner Pocket 21.5 x 27.9cm - Green
features: [A4 Journal] The A4 size(8.3'' × 11.7''), which is the most suitable for the Cornell Notes system, has enough pages to allow you to efficiently record lectures and various notes and 2 gifts (divider sticky notes), with 160 sheets/320 pages. And in a variety of colors to meet your application on various occasions.

[100GSM Premium Thick Paper] - The pages of the Lined notebook is made of 100gsm Acid-free Ivory Paper, the thick paper does not bleed through, and the ivory paper protects your eyesight, it will provide you with a comfortable writing experience!
[FEATURES] A4 Lined journal has 1 elastic band, 2 bookmarks,1 back expendable pocket, 2 free sticky notes, and humanized rounded corner design.

[Faux Leather Soft Cover] - The durable soft cover makes the notebooks more durable and touched comfortably and is easy to put into your bag. The durable cover will protect your journals for years and easy lay out flat for comfortable writing and reading.

[Great Use] Ideal for office, school, and home use, perfect as a personal writing journal, travel journals, business executives notebooks, college course notebooks, daily diary pad, bullet journal, and more. Best gifts for school, children, friends family, or business colleagues!
description: Product Description Why Choose RETTACY Softcover Lined Notebook? -Perfect A4&B5 size, the perfect size which is the most suitable for the Cornell Notes system. -enough pages with 160 sheets/320 pages There are enough pages for you to effectively record lectures and various notes for a year or more. -Each Journal comes with an Elastic Closure,2 Bookmarks,1 Back Pocket, and 2 Free Sticky Notes Dividers. -High-quality 100gsm thick lined paper, no bleeding through, and suitable for most types of pens. Products at a glance→ Go to the right for more information → 2 Bookmarks Bookmarks are more convenient and less damaging to the paper than folding books to register page numbers. 100GSM Premium Thick Paper Acid-free Paper with smooth touch,no bleeding through Faux Leather Soft Cover The durable soft cover to make the notebooks more durable and touched comfortably and is easy to put into your bag. 180° lay-flat Our Notebook has a 180° lay-flat binding that allows easy one-handed note-taking, and we have a careful and rigorous in-house bookbinding process to ensure our books can be used lifetime.
